chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI M.A. No.24 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For order on office objection as at A. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2074/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Mr. Azhar Ali, Associate of Peer Syed Asadullah Rashidi, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Zeeshan Asad, Advocate for respondent No.21. ------------------------------- Mr. Azhar Ali, Associate of Peer Syed Asadullah Rashidi, counsel for the appellant, submits that the appellant does not wish to press this appeal as the same has become infructuous. Counsel for respondent No.21 has no objection. Dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
